perturbation.original_text: The duration of this Venture (the "Term") will begin on March 1, 2020 and continue in full force and effect until February 28, 2025 or as otherwise provided in this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The duration of this Venture (the "Term") will begin on March 1, 2020 and continue in full force and effect until terminated by either member at any given moment or as otherwise provided in this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the Term clause to allow termination by either member at any time directly contradicts the intended duration of the Venture until February 28, 2025. It creates uncertainty as to the contract's enforceability and expected lifespan.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The duration of this Venture (the "Term") will begin on March 1, 2020 and continue in full force and effect until terminated by either member at any given moment or as otherwise provided in this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a termination clause that allows either member to terminate the venture at any time, directly contradicting the original term which was set to end on February 28, 2025. This creates a structural flaw, as the term now has two conflicting conditions for its duration, causing an in-text contradiction that undermines the enforceability and expected lifespan of the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: Each of the Members has contributed to the capital of the Venture, in cash or property in agreed upon value, as follows (the "Capital Contribution"): Member Contribution Description Agreed Value BorrowMoney.com, inc 1, 500 square feet of Leased/rent office Space Includingspecified Description of duty* $3,500,000.00 USD JVLS, LLC dba Vaccines 2Go $60,000.00 USD From Monthly Government , City And State, And Or Private Awarded Contracts. Plus (10%) Of Any Generated Gross Revenue, In Add i t i on to The To ta l Contributions. $3,500,000.00 USD
perturbation.changed_text: Each of the Members *may* contribute to the capital of the Venture, in cash or property in agreed upon value, as follows (the "Capital Contribution"): Member Contribution Description Agreed Value BorrowMoney.com, inc 1, 500 square feet of Leased/rent office Space Includingspecified Description of duty* $3,500,000.00 USD JVLS, LLC dba Vaccines 2Go $60,000.00 USD From Monthly Government , City And State, And Or Private Awarded Contracts. Plus (10%) Of Any Generated Gross Revenue, In Add i t i on to The To ta l Contributions. $0.00 USD
perturbation.explanation: Changing "has contributed" to "may contribute" regarding capital contributions and setting JVLS contribution to 0.00 introduces uncertainty and contradicts the prior statement that each member has contributed a specific amount. This creates conflict regarding the financial obligations and ownership stakes within the joint venture, specifically regarding JVLS contribution, where in the original text stated that their Capital Contribution was $3,500,000.00 USD.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All Members will contribute their respective Capital Contributions fully and on time.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction because it modifies 'has contributed' to 'may contribute' and sets JVLS's contribution to $0.00. This directly conflicts with the 'Contradicted Text' which states 'All Members will contribute their respective Capital Contributions fully and on time.' The change creates uncertainty about whether JVLS is obligated to contribute capital, creating a direct and impactful contradiction, and falling under Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction as explained above.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may be amended only with the unanimous consent of all Members.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may be amended by a simple majority vote of the Managers and no Member consent is required.
perturbation.explanation: Altering the amendment clause to allow changes by a simple majority of managers, without member consent, directly contradicts the original requirement of unanimous member consent. This shift in power creates conflict over who has authority to modify the agreement and raises concerns about unilateral changes affecting member rights. This directly goes against the original text where it is established that changes in the agreement should have unanimous consent of all members.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement may be amended by a simple majority vote of the Managers and no Member consent is required.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states "This Agreement may be amended by a simple majority vote of the Managers and no Member consent is required" which directly contradicts the original text's requirement for unanimous member consent to amend the agreement. The contradicted text, which is the same as the changed text, highlights the inherent contradiction. This conflict creates uncertainty over the valid amendment procedure, making the agreement's terms ambiguous and potentially unenforceable as the modified text directly violates previously agreed terms.
